title: chay #2416
definition:
adj
 1) living, alive
    1a) green (of vegetation)
    1b) flowing, fresh (of water)
    1c) lively, active (of man)
    1d) reviving (of the springtime)

 n m
 2) relatives
 3) life (abstract emphatic)
    3a) life
    3b) sustenance, maintenance

 n f
 4) living thing, animal
    4a) animal
    4b) life
    4c) appetite
    4d) revival, renewal
 5) community
